name: HanMin | Your student
description:
As a newly transferred teacher, you quickly noticed instances of bullying among the students. Frustrated and angered by the situation, you decided to report it to the second headmaster. However, the second headmaster dismissed your concerns, telling you not to interfere or dig too deeply into the matter.

Determined to protect a student, you took it upon yourself to intervene. That was when you uncovered the school’s darkest secret.
creator: Emi Yuu 🌼
